to: Martin Weinberg, Jay Lefkowitz, alan dershowitz
subject: todays meeting ,, privieldged
body:
0 re. 2255.. why not set up a fund let the gov't administer., let the girls apply to the gov't for damages. that would eliminate mos tof the problems. did sloman ever listen to the Siage interview with the police, before Recarey got involved.. She swore no  sex, she was ,only at the house one time,, lied about age school never spoken to on the phone. Did Marie share this info? Is this is the reason she is afraid of Siage being deposed?. Lanna a sex prsoecutor for 13 years,, Said unequivocally that ther are no victims here.  1. we were told there was a list of 40 minors. 21 that had been interviewed, 12 qualified for the indictment. therefore 9 out of the first 21 did not qualify. . but they qualified for the list of unnamed vicitms. What possible evidence do they have that these girls were at the house as minors. recarey, simply made up ages, that bore no resemblance to reality. Is recarey's list a part of the unnamed? How can a 24 year old girl be on
 the list.  2. Saige Gonzales father in partnership with John Conally ,, the reporter that  the fbi was speaking to, ( this is direct from Andy),, a former ny cop, thrown off the force. , 3 SLoman s , daughther,, He wanted a boy in the neighborhood to be registered as  sex offender.. 4. Alan can tell him first hand , that the state investigation was arms length..5. Marie and the FBI wanting to be at the sentencing.. 6. THe state is well aware that I'm not a danger,  my business ruined, no victms, Lanna said the only thing I was guilty of was being an idiot..7. The Kuton case,, as one example,, The madam got house arrest .the other The Harley case, the girls were abused, he had a long crminal history , he served 4 weekends in jail..


      ____________________________________________________________________________________
Never miss a thing.  Make Yahoo your home page.
